Drawing from a poignant personal story about a friend's heart-wrenching experience of being cut off after a gift of a house, she underscored that parental affection does not always equate to gratitude or care from children.

Big revelation! 'MS Dhoni never said drop Yuvraj Singh': Former selector
description: Former chief selector Sandeep Patil has refuted claims by Yograj Singh that MS Dhoni was responsible for Yuvraj Singh's ouster from the Indian team. Patil stated on record that Dhoni never requested Yuvraj's exclusion and fully trusted the selection committee's decisions. He acknowledged a father's emotions but emphasised the blame was misplaced.

title: 1st ODI: Pakistan humbled in Bangladesh; hosts chase target in 15.1 overs
description: Bangladesh crushed Pakistan by eight wickets in the first ODI to take a 1-0 series lead. Pakistan collapsed to 114 after a strong start, with Nahid Rana taking five wickets and Mehidy Hasan Miraz three. In reply, Tanzid Hasan Tamim smashed 67 not out, helping Bangladesh chase the target comfortably in 15.1 overs. Pakistan’s bowlers struggled to create pressure.

description: Olympic gymnastics icon Simone Biles has recently moved into her dream home after years of planning and construction. The celebrated gymnast and her husband, the NFL star Jonathan Owens, recently settled into their stunning waterfront mansion in Texas, a property reportedly worth around $3 million. The couple spent several years designing and building the house. The project finally has now been completed, allowing them to enjoy the home they always wanted.

The digital approach aims for efficiency and transparency.

Karnataka govt weighs 1 airport for 3 districts after Udan setback
description: Karnataka government is considering a single airport for Ballari, Vijayanagara, and Koppal districts due to mixed results of the Centre's Udan scheme. Infrastructure Minister MB Patil highlighted struggles of regional airports post-Udan support, aiming to avoid a 'white elephant' project. The state is examining a viable model for the Kalyana Karnataka region, with land already acquired for a Ballari airport.

title: Khushboo Sundar on World Cup trophy being taken to temple: 'The trophy is for India'
description: Actor and politician Khushboo Sundar emphasized that the World Cup trophy belongs to all of India, urging people to view the win as national pride, not a religious matter. She defended taking the trophy to places of worship, citing cricketers' personal expressions of gratitude and devotion. Read on to know more in detail.

USCIS issues 'alert', shares details of the form it will reject starting April 1
description: USCIS has updated Form I-129, effective April 1, 2026, requiring employers to detail educational and experience requirements for H-1B visa applicants. This change aims to align with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments and verify consistency between the Labor Condition Application and the registration process, impacting the upcoming FY27 H1B cap season.

title: Alysa Liu questions father Arthur Liu’s anger over Team USA comeback
description: Team USA figure skater Alysa Liu shared honest feelings about her father Arthur Liu while discussing her return to skating in a March 7 interview with Rolling Stone. After retiring in 2022 and coming back in 2024, Liu said she wanted the decision to be fully hers. Past pressure and strict training shaped how she now approaches the sport.

title: Amazon to FCC: Reject application of Musk's SpaceX for Space data centers
description: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal. Citing a lack of crucial technical and safety details, Amazon argues the plan is speculative, could take centuries to deploy, and poses significant risks to orbital space. The filing highlights concerns over interference, collision avoidance, and the sheer unrealistic scale of SpaceX's vision.

title: Jeffree Star exposes Stefon Diggs’ alleged DMs, drags Cardi B and Nicki Minaj feud
description: Tensions flared as Jeffree Star claimed Cardi B's baby daddy, Stefon Diggs, contacted him, escalating the Cardi-Nicki feud. Star sided with Nicki Minaj, criticizing Cardi's relationship choices amid Diggs' sexual assault allegations. This online drama highlights celebrity loyalty and the rapid spread of private disputes in the digital age, with Diggs' situation unlikely to cool down soon.
